channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Stop picking at your cuticles! 7 ways to keep your nails healthy and strong
item.description: Should you trim your cuticles? How do you cut a hangnail? Is it better to use a cardboard or crystal file? Dermatologists and a nail technician share ...

item.title: After the Supreme Court's ruling on tariffs, companies line up for refunds
item.description: The Supreme Court on Friday struck down President Trump's tariffs. But the justices left a $133 billion question unanswered: What's going to happen to...

item.title: Former top general calls military's removal of trans troops a costly mistake
item.description: As several global tensions simmer, the Pentagon is removing thousands of transgender troops under an anti-DEI push. How might a focus on gender identi...

item.title: Avalanches kill five in Austrian Alps, officials say
item.description: A man skiing with his son was among the victims on Friday, bringing the region's avalanche death toll this season to at least 21.

item.title: Tumbler Ridge suspect's ChatGPT account banned before shooting
item.description: OpenAI said the account's activity did not meet the threshold to flag it to authorities when it was identified.

item.title: Israeli strikes kill at least 10 in Lebanon, officials say
item.description: The strikes are among the deadliest in Lebanon since a ceasefire ended the war between Israel and Hezbollah.

item.title: See the Olympics schedule for the 2026 Milano Cortina Games
item.description: This is what you need to know about when the 2026 Milano Cortina Winter Olympics start and end, along with key games and events on the schedule.

item.title: Judge who held DOJ lawyer in contempt blasts handling of immigration cases
item.description: A federal judge who took the extraordinary step of holding a government lawyer in contempt of court earlier this week blasted the Justice Department f...

item.title: Trump imposes 10% tariffs on all countries after SCOTUS struck down earlier tariffs
item.description: President Trump signed an order that will impose 10% tariffs on imports from all countries, just hours after the Supreme Court struck down a different...

item.title: Palestinian Authority in dire straits as Israel's hold on West Bank deepens
item.description: More than 30 years after its creation, there are increasing warnings that the PA is close to collapse.

item.title: Italian toddler dies after transplant with heart 'burned by frostbite'
item.description: The heart given to two-year-old Domenico was reportedly severely damaged during its transfer to hospital.

item.title: 2/20: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: Supreme Court strikes down Trump's emergency tariffs; U.S. and Canada to face off for gold medal in men's hockey

item.title: 2/20: CBS Evening News
item.description: Trump lashes out at Supreme Court after justices strike down his tariffs; Man's cat sanctuary naps still helping rescue expand years after they first ...

item.title: In Berlin, there are movies, there's politics and there's talk about it all
item.description: Buzz around whether the city's film festival would take a stance on the war in Gaza has dominated conversation in recent days.

item.title: Alex Ferreira wins 10th gold medal for Team USA, matching America's highest total in Winter Olympics
item.description: Freeskier Alex Ferreira clinches a tenth gold medal for the U.S. in these Games, tying the U.S.'s all-time record for gold medals in a Winter Olympics...

item.title: All truckers and bus drivers will be required to take commercial driverâs license tests in English
Supreme Court strikes down Trumpâs sweeping tariffs, sparking fierce pushback and vow of new levies
item.description: President Donald Trump says heâs imposing a temporary global tariff of 10% after his far-reaching tariff regimen was struck down by the Supreme Court.

item.title: NASA targets March for first moon mission by Artemis astronauts after fueling test success
